body:
Based on the information available, it appears that Valiant Garage Door does custom garage door work and is associated with custom door projects, so a modern glass garage door is likely within their capabilities. However, I couldn't find a definitive published statement from Valiant specifically advertising modern glass garage doors, so it's best to confirm directly with them. [Pick a Door any Door ….](https://www.reddit.com/r/GarageDoorInstall/comments/1u5cjpf/pick_a_door_any_door/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Valiant Garage Door - Unlicensed Contractor Reviews - San Leandro, CA | HomeAdvisor](https://www.homeadvisor.com/rated.Garagedoorrepair.126145446.html?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If they offer custom installations, a modern glass garage door can typically be built with options such as:

  * Full-view aluminum-and-glass construction

  * Frosted, tinted, clear, or laminated glass

  * Black, bronze, or custom powder-coated frames

  * Insulated glass panels for improved energy efficiency

  * Custom sizing and panel layouts to match your home's architecture [Modern Glass & Aluminum Garage Doors | Clopay Avante](https://www.clopaydoor.com/avante.aspx?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Glass Garage Doors - Model 8850](https://www.wayne-dalton.com/garage-doors/detail/glass-garage-doors-8850?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Modern Glass Garage Doors - Creative Door Services](https://creativedoor.com/residential-products/garage-doors/modern-glass?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

When you contact Valiant Garage Door, ask:

  1. Do you install full-view aluminum glass garage doors?

  2. Which manufacturers do you work with (e.g., Clopay or Wayne Dalton)?

  3. Can you provide insulated glass options?

  4. Can they create a custom design based on photos of your home?

  5. What is the estimated lead time and installed cost?

For reference, modern glass garage doors are commonly available as custom products and often use aluminum frames with configurable glass types and finishes. [Modern Glass & Aluminum Garage Doors | Clopay Avante](https://www.clopaydoor.com/avante.aspx?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Modern Glass Garage Door Model 8850, Wayne Dalton of Windsor](https://waynedaltonofwindsor.com/residential-garage-doors/modern-glass-garage-doors/modern-glass-garage-door-model-8850/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[Overhead Door™ Envy Collection Modern Glass Garage Doors](https://www.overheaddoors.com/glass-garage-doors/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you'd like, I can also help you evaluate whether a full-glass, frosted-glass, or mixed steel-and-glass design would look best with your home's style.
